title: microchilus subquadratus
intro: Microchilus subquadratus, also known as the quadrangular orchid, is a plant species in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Microchilus subquadratus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts, infusions, or decoctions, and is commonly used in traditional medicine practices.
